title: Backtesting crypto bot
author: fikabonds
selftext:
Left column is spot and right is a dynamic version where the bot chooses 1-2x leverage. Backtest performed between 20240101-20240601.

Backtes peformed between 20210101 to 20240601 as well with 1,4 vs 11.2m profit.

comments.author: fikabonds
comments.body: Backtest peformed on real BTCUSDT 1min chart data.

comments.author: Individual_Hold_5440
comments.body:
Nice back-test! 🎉

1️⃣ Context > headline %
+685 % (spot) vs. +2 050 % (1-2× leverage) is eye-catching, but risk climbs too: max drawdown widens from –11.5 % to –18.5 %.

2️⃣ Five-month window = over-fit risk
Jan 1 → Jun 1 2024 covers just one mini-bull phase. Try walk-forward / out-of-sample testing, add 2022 bear + 2023 chop, and model real fees & slippage.

3️⃣ Live ≠ back-test
Our fully-automated Tradeum bot (100 % spot, zero leverage) delivered +110.74 % equity growth over the last 12 months with a –14.4 % max drawdown. Far from a 20× pop, yet transparent, risk-managed, and repeatable. You can verify every trade in real time here: tradeum.ai/result.

4️⃣ Spot vs. leverage
A 7.8 Sharpe and mild drawdown on spot may already satisfy most investors; doubling risk for more gain can get expensive once real-world slippage and funding fees kick in.

For anyone curious about how an AI-driven, plug-and-play spot bot works, the details are on tradeum.ai.

Crypto markets never sleep neither does Tradeum. 🚀
Disclosure: I’m on the Tradeum team. This isn’t financial advice; just sharing our methodology and live results.

comments.author: fikabonds
comments.body:
Scrapped this entirely as it started to run into several issues and updating the code just made it worse and spireled into a never ending hole of issues 🤣.

New bot has confirmed 987% return on 18 months of backtesting. Which is actually better then this.
